{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Relic Infobox|Darkstone Periapt|2}}{{R|Darkstone Periapt||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Trash Heap|2}}. It raises Max HP by 6 when a Curse is obtained.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained randomly from {{E|Trash Heap|2}} by selecting the {{Frame|Dive In}} option.
